description_long: This is a rugged, low-cut athletic shoe designed for urban environments, featuring a durable dark gray synthetic upper with mesh panels for breathability. The shoe has a reinforced toe cap and heel for added protection and longevity, and a thick, contoured rubber sole for enhanced grip and shock absorption. Decorative white chevron patterns run along the sides, contrasting with the otherwise muted color palette. The lacing system is standard criss-cross with round black laces, and there is a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The interior lining is orange, providing a pop of color and likely additional comfort. The overall build suggests a focus on durability, comfort, and utility for everyday urban use.
description: A sturdy, dark gray athletic shoe with mesh panels, white chevron side accents, and orange interior lining. Features a reinforced toe, thick rubber sole, and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white chevron accents, mesh panels, and reinforced toe and heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel pull tab, orange interior lining, and padded collar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar chevron accents and mesh details, showing the shoe's overall profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded reinforced toe, lacing system, and visible 'STEELION' text on the tongue.
